name: @irisrun/channel-slack
description: Iris Slack channel for durable human-in-the-loop — built on the channel port to showcase the moat where a buyer feels it: a Slack approval that pauses for hours, survives a redeploy, and resumes the SAME session byte-identically, because the durable session lives in the StateStore journal and the approval context rides the signed Slack button value, not server memory. Zero runtime deps: node:crypto signature verification + built-in fetch (injectable).
